features: Original Source: We capture the intensity nature has to offer. Original Source is made with 100 Percent natural fragrances, we’re inspired by nature, from bold scents and vibrant colours, we've made it our mission to share fresh sensorial hits in every shower

The Power of Nature: We’ve waited 7,872 tropical hours to help ripen our coconuts before we squeeze them with shea butter. 100 Percent natural fragrance in every bottle of shower gel. Experience a hit of tropical paradise anytime you like with coconut and shea butter shower gel

100 Percent Vegan and Cruelty Free Original Source is proudly vegan and we carry the logo on all products. Products are tested on us, never on animals. This fragrance is created to offer a shower experience to stimulate the senses with an intense hit of nature
Paraben free: The Coconut and Shea Butter shower wash has been consciously made without parabens
Shower gel mutlipack: Extend your daily dose of tropical paradise and nature with this 6 x 500 ml shower gel multipack
description: Product Description A shower gel multipack with 6 bottles bursting with a different and tropical fragrance. Experience a hit of tropical paradise anytime you like with Original Source Tropical Coconut & Shea Butter shower gel. We've waited 7,872 tropical hours to help ripen our coconuts before we squeeze them with shea butter and pack them into every bottle. Products are tested on us, never on animals, paraben free and we’re proud to be Vegan too. Original Source Shower Gel is manufactured in the UK using 100 Percent renewable energy and bottles are 100 Percent recyclable. Enjoy your daily shower time with a sensorial hit of nature. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Polyquaternium-7, Parfum, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Fruit Extract, Shea Butter Glycereth-8 Esters, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Lactic Acid, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, C11-15 Pareth-7, C11-15 Pareth-40, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Potassium Sorbate. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Manufacturer Contact Information Freepost PZ Cussons (UK) Ltd 3500 Aviator Way, Manchester M22 5TG See more
